title: trifolium bilineatum
intro: Trifolium bilineatum, also known as the two-lined clover, is a species of flowering plant in the pea family Fabaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its antispasmodic and anti-inflammatory effects, which can be used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Trifolium bilineatum include relief from symptoms of menopause, such as hot flashes and night sweats, as well as reduction in menstrual cramps and improvement in digestive issues. Trifolium bilineatum can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, making it a versatile and accessible remedy for those seeking natural health solutions.
